author: driver--design-phase-4b-web-md-bbdc
content: Completed: Implemented vitreous_web WASM/DOM backend (phase 4b). 6 modules: styles.rs (Style->CSS), aria.rs (AccessibilityInfo->ARIA), events.rs (DOM->vitreous events), dom.rs (element creation + key-based reconciliation), mount.rs (mount() with reactive loop), web_apis.rs (fetch/localStorage/History). 28 unit tests, 0 clippy warnings, clean formatting. Commit 511d8e0.
